description.value: The targeted construct gains fast healing 5. This does not stack with any fast healing the construct already has. Fast healing has no effect on a construct that has been brought to 0 hit points or destroyed. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
